metadata.title: Product Bricks
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the hosted-stays-marketplace domain.

bricks.name: Guest Experience
bricks.description: Guest-facing discovery, booking, and trip confidence capabilities.

children.name: Inspiration & Category Discovery
children.description: Guest entry surfaces that turn broad trip intent into relevant categories, destinations, and marketplace sessions.

internalModules.title: Category and destination landing assembly
internalModules.description: Builds themed browse and destination-entry experiences.

internalModules.title: Intent recovery and recirculation
internalModules.description: Restores recent-search and preference context across guest sessions.

interfaces.title: Browse UI
interfaces.description: Guest-facing browse and category surfaces.

interfaces.title: Landing content API
interfaces.description: API used to assemble category and destination modules.

brickDependencies.description: Hands high-intent browse context into search.

children.name: Search, Ranking & Map Browse
children.description: Guest search, ranking, filtering, and map-led browsing across homes, rooms, and stay attributes.

internalModules.title: Search index and relevance engine
internalModules.description: Serves listing search, filtering, and ranking.

internalModules.title: Map browse and geo-intent layer
internalModules.description: Supports map-based exploration and neighborhood fit.

interfaces.title: Search UI
interfaces.description: Primary guest search and result experience.

interfaces.title: Search and ranking API
interfaces.description: API used to return ranked listing sets and filters.

brickDependencies.description: Uses marketplace signals to improve ranking quality.
Depends on accurate listing content and review quality.

children.name: Listing Detail & Review Trust
children.description: Listing page, review presentation, amenity clarity, host reputation, and policy explanation before booking.

internalModules.title: Listing content renderer
internalModules.description: Builds listing detail views with media, amenities, and house rules.

internalModules.title: Review and trust evidence service
internalModules.description: Provides review summaries, quality signals, and host credibility surfaces.

interfaces.title: Listing detail UI
interfaces.description: Guest-facing listing page and trust presentation.

interfaces.title: Listing detail API
interfaces.description: API for listing, host, and review detail.

brickDependencies.description: Uses marketplace trust context to reduce booking anxiety.
Uses validated review signals after completed stays.

children.name: Wishlists & Sharing
children.description: Guest shortlisting, sharing, and group coordination before booking.

internalModules.title: Saved-lists service
internalModules.description: Stores guest wishlists and shortlist state.

internalModules.title: Share and collaboration layer
internalModules.description: Enables links and group trip planning workflows.

interfaces.title: Wishlists UI
interfaces.description: Guest-facing shortlist and sharing features.

interfaces.title: Saved list API
interfaces.description: API for saved homes and shortlist state.

children.name: Booking & Checkout
children.description: Reservation creation, fee and policy explanation, payment choice, and booking confirmation.

internalModules.title: Reservation orchestration
internalModules.description: Validates listing state, guest details, and policy conditions at booking time.

internalModules.title: Checkout experience
internalModules.description: Drives guest booking flows across web and mobile.

interfaces.title: Checkout UI
interfaces.description: Guest-facing booking and confirmation flow.

interfaces.title: Reservation API
interfaces.description: API for creating and confirming reservations.

brickDependencies.description: Uses payment, fee, and refund logic.
Checks trust and screening state before confirmation.

children.name: Trip Messaging & Itinerary
children.description: Reservation visibility, messaging, check-in coordination, and guest itinerary management.

internalModules.title: Reservation timeline service
internalModules.description: Stores itinerary state, check-in detail, and trip milestones.

internalModules.title: Guest-host messaging
internalModules.description: Supports pre-stay, in-stay, and issue-related communication.

interfaces.title: Trip UI
interfaces.description: Guest and host trip management interfaces.

interfaces.title: Messaging API
interfaces.description: API for reservation-linked messages and itinerary state.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on confirmed reservation state.

children.name: Guest Reviews & Re-engagement
children.description: Post-stay reviews, reputation feedback loops, and recirculation into the next booking journey.

internalModules.title: Review collection service
internalModules.description: Collects guest and host reviews after completed stays.

internalModules.title: Re-engagement triggers
internalModules.description: Turns completed stays into repeat marketplace activity.

interfaces.title: Review submission UI
interfaces.description: Post-stay review and feedback workflow.

interfaces.title: Review API
interfaces.description: API for review submission, moderation, and retrieval.

brickDependencies.description: Uses trust controls to moderate abusive or invalid reviews.

bricks.name: Host Success
bricks.description: Host activation, listing quality, operating control, and earnings capabilities.

children.name: Host Onboarding & Verification
children.description: Host signup, onboarding, readiness checks, and verification before a listing goes live.

internalModules.title: Host activation flow
internalModules.description: Guides new hosts through setup and eligibility tasks.

internalModules.title: Host readiness service
internalModules.description: Evaluates whether listing, identity, and policy prerequisites are complete.

interfaces.title: Host onboarding UI
interfaces.description: Host-facing activation and setup workflow.

interfaces.title: Readiness API
interfaces.description: API for activation status and verification steps.

brickDependencies.description: Uses identity verification to confirm host legitimacy.
Uses local market policy eligibility and restrictions.

children.name: Listing Authoring & Content
children.description: Listing setup, content editing, photo guidance, policy selection, and amenity configuration.

internalModules.title: Listing editor
internalModules.description: Supports content authoring for titles, descriptions, photos, and house rules.

internalModules.title: Content quality service
internalModules.description: Scores listing completeness and merchandising quality.

interfaces.title: Listing editor UI
interfaces.description: Host-facing content editing workflow.

interfaces.title: Listing content API
interfaces.description: API for listing content state and validation.

brickDependencies.description: Provides listing data consumed by guest-facing listing pages.

children.name: Calendar & Availability
children.description: Date availability, stay rules, booking windows, and availability accuracy controls.

internalModules.title: Availability engine
internalModules.description: Maintains bookable dates, blocks, and stay restrictions.

internalModules.title: Calendar control UI
internalModules.description: Host-facing calendar and booking-window controls.

interfaces.title: Calendar UI
interfaces.description: Availability controls for hosts and operators.

interfaces.title: Availability API
interfaces.description: API for bookable dates and stay rules.

brickDependencies.description: Receives booking-state changes that affect availability.

children.name: Pricing & Discounts
children.description: Nightly pricing, discount programs, stay rules, and monetization guidance for hosts and operators.

internalModules.title: Pricing rules engine
internalModules.description: Applies host-defined pricing, discounts, and length-of-stay rules.

internalModules.title: Pricing guidance layer
internalModules.description: Surfaces marketplace-informed pricing suggestions and discount prompts.

interfaces.title: Pricing UI
interfaces.description: Host-facing pricing and promotion controls.

interfaces.title: Pricing API
interfaces.description: API for prices, discounts, and price recommendations.

brickDependencies.description: Uses demand and search insight to inform pricing suggestions.

children.name: Turnover & Operations Coordination
children.description: Changeover, cleaning, readiness, and reservation-level operating coordination.

internalModules.title: Turnover task engine
internalModules.description: Tracks readiness and changeover tasks before and after stays.

internalModules.title: Ops coordination UI
internalModules.description: Supports operators and co-hosts managing stay-readiness workflows.

interfaces.title: Operations UI
interfaces.description: Reservation-linked operations task view.

interfaces.title: Operations API
interfaces.description: API for turnover tasks and readiness status.

brickDependencies.description: Uses reservation timing and itinerary details.

children.name: Co-host Network & Permissions
children.description: Delegated operations, listing-level permissions, and portfolio collaboration across hosts and co-hosts.

internalModules.title: Role and permission service
internalModules.description: Stores delegated permissions and audit trails.

internalModules.title: Co-host collaboration UI
internalModules.description: Supports multi-user listing and reservation operations.

interfaces.title: Co-host management UI
interfaces.description: Host-facing permission and delegation workflow.

interfaces.title: Permissions API
interfaces.description: API for role-based access and delegated actions.

brickDependencies.description: Shares portfolio and performance context with operator surfaces.

children.name: Host Performance & Earnings
children.description: Occupancy, earnings, response quality, listing performance, and operator reconciliation views.

internalModules.title: Host performance warehouse
internalModules.description: Aggregates bookings, earnings, quality, and response metrics.

internalModules.title: Earnings and performance dashboards
internalModules.description: Presents monetization and listing-health insight to hosts and operators.

interfaces.title: Host dashboard UI
interfaces.description: Host- and operator-facing performance and earnings views.

interfaces.title: Host analytics API
interfaces.description: API for earnings, occupancy, and listing-quality reporting.

brickDependencies.description: Uses payout and fee data for earnings reporting.
Uses comparative marketplace signals to explain performance.

bricks.name: Marketplace Foundations
bricks.description: Shared trust, financial, policy, analytics, and integration capabilities.

children.name: Identity & Verification
children.description: Guest and host identity verification, document checks, and core screening signals.

internalModules.title: Identity verification workflow
internalModules.description: Collects and validates identity information for guests and hosts.

interfaces.title: Verification API
interfaces.description: Shared verification and status API.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Used for document, watchlist, and identity checks.

children.name: Trust, Safety & AirCover
children.description: Reservation screening, trust enforcement, host protection, guest safety, and AirCover-related controls.

internalModules.title: Risk scoring and screening
internalModules.description: Evaluates reservation risk and policy-sensitive demand.

internalModules.title: Protection and incident workflow
internalModules.description: Supports AirCover, damage, and safety intervention paths.

interfaces.title: Trust decision API
interfaces.description: Shared API for risk and trust decisions.

interfaces.title: Incident operations UI
interfaces.description: Internal trust and incident handling workflow.

brickDependencies.description: Uses identity state as input to risk decisions.

children.name: Payments, Taxes & Payouts
children.description: Guest payments, host payouts, fee logic, refund handling, tax flows, and financial ledger state.

internalModules.title: Payment orchestration
internalModules.description: Processes payment, refund, and charge state for reservations.

internalModules.title: Host payout ledger
internalModules.description: Tracks fees, taxes, and payout timing.

interfaces.title: Payments API
interfaces.description: API for charges, refunds, fees, and payout events.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Used to collect guest funds and remit host payouts.

children.name: Resolutions & Support
children.description: Structured support, claims, refund, dispute, and service-recovery workflows.

internalModules.title: Case orchestration
internalModules.description: Coordinates cases across guests, hosts, trust teams, and payouts.

internalModules.title: Resolution center
internalModules.description: Guest- and host-facing issue and claim management surfaces.

interfaces.title: Resolution UI
interfaces.description: User-facing and internal support workflows.

interfaces.title: Support case API
interfaces.description: API for claims, disputes, and issue-case state.

brickDependencies.description: Uses refund and payout state during case handling.
Uses trust signals for incident-aware case handling.

children.name: Local Compliance & Policy Controls
children.description: Market-specific rule management, listing eligibility controls, policy enforcement, and audit state.

internalModules.title: Market policy registry
internalModules.description: Stores market-level rules, restrictions, and listing requirements.

interfaces.title: Policy control API
interfaces.description: API for listing eligibility and market-rule decisions.

children.name: Marketplace Intelligence & Experimentation
children.description: Demand insight, experiment measurement, search intelligence, pricing signals, and marketplace reporting.

internalModules.title: Marketplace insight warehouse
internalModules.description: Aggregates guest, host, booking, and issue-cost metrics.

internalModules.title: Experimentation and recommendation layer
internalModules.description: Supports ranking, pricing, and workflow optimization decisions.

interfaces.title: Insights API
interfaces.description: Shared API for pricing, search, and quality insights.

children.name: Partner APIs & Channel Connectivity
children.description: Partner sync, operational exports, and external connectivity surfaces for scaled operators and ecosystem tooling.

internalModules.title: Partner gateway
internalModules.description: Provides authenticated access to portfolio and reservation interfaces.

internalModules.title: Sync and export services
internalModules.description: Supports operational export and portfolio synchronization patterns.

interfaces.title: Partner API
interfaces.description: API surface for professional operators and partner systems.

brickDependencies.description: Uses reservation state for partner sync where allowed.
Uses portfolio reporting and earnings data for export workflows.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Consumes portfolio sync and export interfaces.
